ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Job position ID of the employee */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Office location ID of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Company email of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "job_start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started their current job */,
  "job_end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended their current job (if applicable) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the job position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the position belongs */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hiring manager for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office location */,
  "location" TEXT /* City or country where the office is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the office */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the employee's performance */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "evaluation_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., health insurance) */,
  "benefit_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "benefit_start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit started */,
  "benefit_end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ended (if applicable) */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, retirement, vacation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
column_names: Job position ID of the employee
Office location ID of the employee
Phone number of the emergency contact
Date the employee started their current job
Date the employee ended their current job (if applicable)
Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated, on leave)
Detailed description of the job position
ID of the hiring manager for the position
City or country where the office is located
ID of the employee being evaluated
ID of the person who performed the evaluation
ID of the employee receiving the benefit
Name of the benefit (e.g., health insurance)
Type of benefit (e.g., health, retirement, vacation)
